allow: Bash(python -c "from tools.server import app; print\(''Server imports OK''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Dashboard: {d[""counts""][""today""]} today, {d[""counts""][""overdue""]} overdue, {d[""counts""][""upcoming""]} upcoming''''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Notes: {len\(d[""notes""]\)} returned''''\); [print\(f''''  [{n[""type""]}] {n[""title""]}''''\) for n in d[''''notes''''][:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Notes: {len\(d[""notes""]\)} returned''''\); [print\(f''''  [{n.get\(""type"",""?""\)}] {n[""title""]}''''\) for n in d[''''notes''''][:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Reading: {len\(d[""currently_reading""]\)}  All: {len\(d[""all_books""]\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  {b[""title""]} by {b[""author""]}''''\) for b in d[''''currently_reading'''']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Recipes: {len\(d[""recipes""]\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  {r[""title""]}''''\) for r in d[''''recipes''''][:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Recipes: {len\(d[""recipes""]\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  {r[""title""]} \(fav: {r[""favorite""]}\)''''\) for r in d[''''recipes''''][:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d[''''counts'''']; print\(f''''Completed: {c[""completed""]}  Carry-over: {c[""carry_over""]}  Next week: {c[""next_week""]}''''\)")
